cot_prefix: Okay, let's figure out when Leslie could have gone to the movies. The key here is to check the times when Leslie was seen doing other activities and make sure the movie time doesn't overlap with those. First, Leslie woke up at 6am. Then, Susan saw Leslie on the rooftop from 6am to 7am. So from 6 to 7 am, Leslie was on the roof. That means Leslie couldn't go to the movies
